channel.title: Ashraf El Desoky – Articles
channel.description: Articles and insights on project management, telecommunications, and digital transformation

item.title: Negotiation Psychology and Cognitive Biases in Construction: Thinking About Thinking
item.description: Expert guide to negotiation psychology and cognitive biases in construction — anchoring bias, confirmation bias, overconfidence, loss aversion, framing effects, and debiasing strategies for better negotiation outcomes.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Why a Negotiation Playbook Is the Difference Between Amateurs and Professionals
item.description: Every profession has a playbook. Surgeons follow protocols. Pilots use checklists. Lawyers prepare case strategies. Yet most negotiators walk into high-sta
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Mediation and Alternative Dispute Resolution in Construction Negotiation
item.description: Expert guide to mediation and ADR in construction — mediation process, facilitation techniques, negotiation in mediation, when to mediate vs arbitrate, and achieving settlement through assisted negotiation.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Why Virtual Negotiation Is Not Just In-Person Negotiation on a Screen
item.description: The shift to virtual negotiation was accelerated by the COVID-19 pandemic, but it's now a permanent feature of business. A McKinsey study found that 70-80%
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Negotiation in Design-Build and EPC Construction Contracts
item.description: Expert guide to design-build and EPC contract negotiation — employer requirements, design risk, performance guarantees, interface management, and turnkey delivery negotiation strategies.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Why Project Managers Are Negotiators Whether They Know It or Not
item.description: A project manager spends 70-90% of their time communicating — and a significant portion of that communication is negotiation. Every scope change, every res
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Negotiation in Public-Private Partnerships: Infrastructure Project Strategies
item.description: Expert guide to PPP negotiation — concession agreements, risk allocation, payment mechanisms, government guarantees, value for money, and lifecycle contract management for infrastructure projects.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Why Crisis Negotiation Principles Apply to Business — and Why Most Leaders Get It Wrong
item.description: When a hostage negotiator faces a barricaded subject, the stakes are literally life and death. There is no room for error, no opportunity for a do-over, an
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Negotiating with Subcontractors in Construction Projects: Strategies and Best Practices
item.description: Expert guide to subcontractor negotiation — selection, back-to-back terms, risk transfer, payment terms, performance management, and dispute resolution in construction subcontracting.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Why Multi-Party Negotiation Is Exponentially More Complex Than Two-Party Negotiation
item.description: A two-party negotiation has one relationship dynamic. A three-party negotiation has three. A five-party negotiation has ten. A ten-party negotiation has fo
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Negotiation in Construction Joint Ventures and Consortiums
item.description: Expert guide to negotiating joint venture and consortium agreements in construction — partner selection, risk allocation, profit sharing, governance, dispute resolution, and exit strategies.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Why Ethics Is the Foundation of Sustainable Negotiation Success
item.description: In 2015, Volkswagen admitted to installing "defeat devices" in 11 million diesel vehicles to cheat emissions tests. The negotiation that led to this decisi
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Negotiating Under Time Pressure in Construction: Managing Deadlines and Urgency
item.description: Expert guide to negotiating under time pressure in construction — managing artificial deadlines, using time strategically, avoiding rushed decisions, and maintaining quality under urgency.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Why Understanding Psychological Tactics Makes You a Better Negotiator — and a Better Defender
item.description: Every negotiation is a psychological battlefield. Whether you realise it or not, cognitive biases, emotional triggers, and influence principles shape every
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Negotiation Preparation and Planning for Construction Professionals
item.description: Expert guide to negotiation preparation — stakeholder analysis, interest mapping, objective setting, team roles, venue selection, and pre-negotiation strategy development for construction professionals.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Why Emotional Intelligence Predicts Negotiation Success More Than IQ
item.description: In a landmark study, researchers at Stanford University analysed 100 MBA students in a negotiation exercise. The students with the highest IQs did not achi
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Final Account Negotiation in Construction Projects: Closing Out Clean
item.description: Expert guide to final account negotiation in construction — preparing the final account, resolving open claims, negotiating retention release, dealing with deductions, and achieving project closeout.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Why Cross-Cultural Negotiation Is the Skill That Defines Global Business
item.description: In 1985, when Toyota and General Motors launched the NUMMI joint venture, cultural differences nearly killed the partnership before it started. GM engineer
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Delay and Extension of Time Negotiation in Construction Contracts
item.description: Expert guide to negotiating delay claims and extensions of time — critical path analysis, concurrent delay, float consumption, time impact analysis, and FIDIC Clause 8.4 entitlement assessment.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Why Conflict Resolution Is the Most Undervalued Leadership Skill
item.description: Conflict in organisations is inevitable. What separates great leaders from average ones is not the absence of conflict — it's the ability to resolve it con
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Negotiation Ethics and Professional Conduct in Construction
item.description: Expert guide to negotiation ethics in construction — honesty vs strategy, disclosure obligations, dealing with deception, ethical dilemmas, and maintaining professional integrity under pressure.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Why Sales Negotiation Is the Revenue Engine
item.description: Every dollar of revenue flows through a negotiation. A 2% improvement in negotiated price, terms, or scope — across an organisation's entire sales pipeline
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Emotional Intelligence in Construction Negotiation: Managing Self and Others
item.description: Expert guide to emotional intelligence in construction negotiation — self-awareness, self-regulation, empathy, social skills, and managing emotional triggers during high-stakes discussions.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Why Vendor Negotiation Is Different from Procurement Negotiation
item.description: Vendor negotiation and procurement negotiation overlap, but they are not the same. Procurement negotiation is transactional — focused on price, terms, and
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Power Dynamics in Construction Negotiation: Sources and Strategies
item.description: Expert guide to power dynamics in construction negotiation — understanding sources of leverage, shifting power balance, managing asymmetry, and negotiating from weak positions.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Why Contract Negotiation Is Where Value Is Created or Destroyed
item.description: A contract is not a legal formality — it is the architecture of a business relationship. Every clause, every definition, every remedy shapes how value is c
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Negotiating Variations and Change Orders in Construction Contracts
item.description: Expert guide to negotiating variations and change orders — valuation methods, rate derivation, scope definition, time impact assessment, and dispute avoidance under FIDIC and standard contracts.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Why Procurement Negotiation Is the Hidden Profit Centre
item.description: For most organisations, the procurement budget represents 40-70% of total revenue. A manufacturer spending $500M annually on goods and services can save $5
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Price Negotiation in Construction Procurement and Tendering
item.description: Expert guide to price negotiation in construction procurement — pre-award negotiation, post-award value engineering, framework agreements, and strategic sourcing for cost optimisation.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Why Salary Negotiation Is the Most Personal Negotiation You'll Ever Do
item.description: Salary negotiation is unique. It's not just about money — it's about self-worth, career trajectory, and the power dynamics between employer and employee. U
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Cross-Cultural Negotiation in International Construction Projects
item.description: Expert guide to cross-cultural negotiation in international construction — understanding cultural dimensions, communication styles, decision-making processes, and building trust across borders.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: When the Stakes Are Highest, the Rules Change
item.description: High-stakes negotiations are qualitatively different from everyday business negotiations. When the outcome affects company survival, career trajectories, o
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Negotiation Tactics for Construction Claim Resolution
item.description: Expert guide to negotiation tactics for resolving construction claims — preparation, presentation, counter-arguments, settlement strategies, and avoiding escalation to arbitration.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Why the First Number Wins (and How to Make It Yours)
item.description: In 1974, Amos Tversky and Daniel Kahneman published a study that revolutionised our understanding of human judgment. They asked participants to estimate th
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Win-Win Negotiation Strategies for Project Managers in Construction
item.description: Expert guide to win-win negotiation strategies for construction project managers — expanding the pie, integrative bargaining, package deals, and maintaining long-term relationships.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Why ZOPA Is the Map Every Negotiator Needs
item.description: Imagine driving to a destination without a map. You know where you want to go, but you don't know the route, the distance, or whether the road is open. Tha
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Procurement Performance Metrics and KPIs: Measuring Success
item.description: Discover the essential KPIs and metrics for evaluating procurement performance and driving continuous improvement.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Managing Virtual and Remote Project Teams: A Complete Guide
item.description: Learn proven strategies for leading distributed project teams, from communication tools to performance management.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: BMS Implementation: A Project Management Perspective
item.description: Guide to managing BMS implementation projects from planning and design through commissioning and handover.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: PACS Project Implementation and Deployment: A PM Guide
item.description: Comprehensive guide to managing PACS implementation projects from vendor selection to go-live and post-deployment support.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Fire Alarm Integration with Building Systems: Complete Guide
item.description: Learn how fire alarm systems integrate with elevators, HVAC, access control, and other building systems for comprehensive safety.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Hotel Mobile Technology and Self Check-in Solutions
item.description: Explore how mobile check-in, digital keys, and in-app services are transforming the hotel guest experience.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Leadership Development and Succession Planning Guide
item.description: Build a strong leadership pipeline with systematic development programs and effective succession planning.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Construction Document Types and Consultant-Contractor Work Cycle: Technical Guide
item.description: Complete technical guide to construction document types (shop drawings, method statements, ITPs, NCRs) and the step-by-step work cycle between consultant and execution companies for expert engineers.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: BATNA Development in Construction Disputes: Building Your Best Alternative
item.description: Expert guide to developing BATNA (Best Alternative to a Negotiated Agreement) in construction disputes — assessing alternatives, improving leverage, and knowing when to walk away.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Why BATNA Mastery Separates Amateurs from Experts
item.description: Walk into any negotiation training, and within the first hour you will hear the word "BATNA." Coined by Roger Fisher and William Ury in *Getting to Yes*, B
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Procurement Risk Management and Compliance: Essential Practices
item.description: Learn how to identify, assess, and mitigate procurement risks while ensuring regulatory compliance and audit readiness.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Resource Optimization and Capacity Planning Strategies
item.description: Master capacity planning and resource optimization to balance demand across projects and maximize utilization.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: BMS Security and Cybersecurity: Best Practices for Building Systems
item.description: Learn essential cybersecurity practices for protecting Building Management Systems from threats and ensuring operational continuity.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: PACS Data Security and HIPAA Compliance: A Practical Guide
item.description: Learn essential security measures for protecting patient imaging data and ensuring HIPAA compliance in PACS environments.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Addressable vs Conventional Fire Alarm Systems: Choosing the Right Type
item.description: Compare addressable and conventional fire alarm systems to select the best option for your building.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Hotel Channel Manager and OTA Integration Guide
item.description: Learn how channel managers sync hotel inventory across OTAs and optimize distribution for maximum bookings.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Remote Team Management: Best Practices for Distributed Teams
item.description: Essential strategies for managing remote teams effectively, maintaining productivity, engagement, and team cohesion.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Consulting Services in Construction: Technical Guide for Engineers
item.description: Comprehensive guide to construction consulting services covering design review, supervision, technical advisory, value engineering, feasibility studies, and the consultant-executor relationship for expert engineers.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Principled Negotiation in Construction Contracts: The Harvard Method
item.description: Expert guide to principled negotiation in construction contracts using the Harvard Fisher-Ury method — separating people from the problem, focusing on interests, generating options, and using objective criteria.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Why Negotiation Matters
item.description: Every professional negotiates daily — whether they realise it or not. A project manager negotiates deadlines with stakeholders. A procurement officer negot
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Procurement Sourcing Strategies: Best Practices for Project Managers
item.description: Explore proven sourcing strategies, vendor evaluation techniques, and supplier relationship management best practices.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Human Resource Planning in Projects: Building High-Performing Teams
item.description: Discover effective human resource planning strategies for assembling, developing, and retaining project teams.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: BMS Integration with IoT and Smart Building Technologies
item.description: Discover how IoT integration transforms traditional BMS into smart building platforms with advanced analytics and automation.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: PACS Cloud Migration and AI Integration: Future of Medical Imaging
item.description: Explore how cloud-based PACS and AI-powered diagnostics are transforming medical imaging workflows.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Fire Alarm Maintenance and Testing: Essential Procedures
item.description: Learn the required maintenance and testing procedures to keep fire alarm systems compliant and reliable.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Enhancing Hotel Guest Experience Through CRM Integration
item.description: Discover how CRM integration with hotel management systems personalizes guest experiences and drives loyalty.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Performance Management and Building a Feedback Culture
item.description: Learn how to implement effective performance management systems and create a culture of continuous feedback.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: MEP in Construction: Complete Technical Guide for Engineers
item.description: Comprehensive technical guide to Mechanical, Electrical and Plumbing (MEP) systems in construction covering design coordination, installation, BIM integration, commissioning and quality control for expert engineers.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Selecting the Right Procurement Contract Type: A Strategic Guide
item.description: Understand fixed-price, cost-reimbursable, and T&M contracts to choose the best procurement contract for your project.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Resource Allocation and Leveling Techniques Explained
item.description: Learn practical resource allocation and leveling techniques to resolve conflicts and optimize project schedules.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: BMS HVAC Control and Energy Optimization Strategies
item.description: Explore how BMS controls HVAC systems and learn energy optimization strategies for maximum efficiency.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: PACS DICOM Standards and System Integration Explained
item.description: Learn how DICOM and HL7 standards enable PACS integration with hospital systems for seamless imaging workflows.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Fire Alarm System Design and Installation Best Practices
item.description: Guide to designing and installing code-compliant fire alarm systems for various building types.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Hotel Revenue Management and Dynamic Pricing Strategy
item.description: Master hotel revenue management with dynamic pricing, forecasting, and yield optimization techniques.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Employee Engagement and Retention Strategies That Work
item.description: Proven strategies for keeping employees engaged, motivated, and committed to your organization long-term.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Project Procurement Management: A Comprehensive Guide
item.description: Master the fundamentals of project procurement management, from planning purchases to contract administration and closure.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Project Resource Management: Essential Guide for PMs
item.description: Master resource planning, allocation, and optimization to deliver projects on time and within budget.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Building Management System (BMS): A Comprehensive Overview
item.description: Understand what a BMS is, its core components, and how it transforms building operations for efficiency and sustainability.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: PACS (Picture Archiving and Communication System): A Complete Guide
item.description: Understand PACS architecture, DICOM standards, and how medical imaging systems transform healthcare delivery.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Fire Alarm Systems Fundamentals: Components and Operation
item.description: Learn the essential components, types, and operation principles of modern fire alarm systems.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Hotel Management System Overview: Features and Benefits
item.description: Comprehensive guide to hotel management systems, their core features, and how they transform hospitality operations.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: People Management Fundamentals: Leading Teams Effectively
item.description: Essential principles and practices for managing people, building teams, and driving organizational success.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Project Controls Manager: Complete Guide to Roles, Skills & Career Path
item.description: Everything you need to know about the Project Controls Manager role — responsibilities, key skills, tools, certifications, salary expectations, and career progression in 2026.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Organizational Behavior: A Psychological and Rational Approach to Managing People at Work
item.description: A comprehensive guide to Organizational Behavior covering team dynamics, power and politics, change management, diversity, remote work, AI, and practical tools for project managers.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Hybrid Agile Methodologies: Scrum, Kanban, Lean & When to Use the Hybrid Approach for Large Projects
item.description: A practical guide to Agile methodologies including Scrum, Kanban, and Lean, their pros and cons, and why the hybrid approach is the best fit for large-scale projects.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Managing Project Controls on FTTH Networks: A Practical Guide to Agile Delivery in Large-Scale Telecom Rollouts
item.description: A practical framework for applying Agile principles to FTTH rollouts, based on real field experience managing project controls for STC deployments.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Building a High-Performance PMO: A Framework for Excellence
item.description: A practical framework for establishing and maturing a Project Management Office that drives organizational success — from governance to KPIs.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Digital Transformation in Construction: From Paper to Platform
item.description: How traditional construction and telecom companies can leverage digital tools — ERP, BIM, and automation — to transform operations and boost productivity.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: 5G Infrastructure Rollout: Project Management Challenges & Solutions
item.description: Managing 5G network deployment at scale — site acquisition, RF planning, vendor coordination, and the risk management strategies that keep rollout on track.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: FTTH Network Planning and Design Best Practices
item.description: FTTH planning is the foundation of every successful fiber rollout. A well-designed network reduces costs, accelerates deployment, and improves long-term reliability.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Managing FTTH Stakeholders and Permits
item.description: Permits and stakeholder approvals are often the longest lead items in FTTH rollouts. Delays here impact the entire schedule.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: FTTH Construction Management and Quality Control
item.description: Construction quality directly affects FTTH performance and maintenance costs. Poor splicing, bending, or sealing creates future failures.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: FTTH Project Scheduling and Resource Allocation
item.description: FTTH rollouts involve thousands of homes, multiple crews, and complex material flows. Scheduling ties it all together.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: FTTH Risk Management and Lessons Learned
item.description: Large FTTH programs face risks in permits, weather, materials, and workforce. Managing them early prevents surprises.rrr
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: PMP Certification 2026: A Complete Study Roadmap
item.description: The PMP exam continues to evolve around predictive, agile, and hybrid approaches. A structured study plan improves your pass probability significantly.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: 5G and FTTH Deployment: A Project Manager's Technical Guide
item.description: 5G and FTTH rollouts demand project managers who understand both business outcomes and telecom engineering. This guide bridges that gap.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Agile Transformation in Construction and Engineering Projects
item.description: Traditional construction projects are predictable, but uncertainty is rising. Agile transformation helps teams adapt without losing schedule and cost discipline.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Earned Value Management: A Complete Guide
item.description: Master EVM fundamentals — PV, EV, AC, CPI, SPI — and learn how to use them to forecast project health with real-world examples.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: FTTH Network Rollout: Lessons from 10 Years with STC
item.description: Key lessons from managing one of the largest FTTH rollout programmes in the Middle East — planning, execution, and challenges.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: PMBOK 8th Edition: A New Era for Project Management
item.description: The PMBOK 8th Edition shifts focus from processes to outcomes and performance domains.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Stakeholder Performance Domain in PMBOK 8
item.description: Stakeholders influence every aspect of a project.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Team Performance Domain: Building High-Performing Teams
item.description: A high-performing team is essential for project success.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Development Approach and Life Cycle Performance Domain
item.description: Choosing the right development approach shapes project delivery.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Planning Performance Domain: From Strategy to Action
item.description: Planning turns strategy into actionable project steps.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Project Work Performance Domain in Practice
item.description: Project work transforms plans into deliverables.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Delivery Performance Domain: Scope and Quality
item.description: Delivery is about producing the right outputs with the right quality.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Measurement Performance Domain: Metrics That Matter
item.description: Measurement turns project data into actionable insight.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Uncertainty Performance Domain: Managing the Unknown
item.description: Projects operate in environments full of uncertainty.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: The Agile Mindset: Values and Principles
item.description: Agile is more than a methodology; it is a mindset.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Scrum Framework Explained
item.description: Scrum is the most popular agile framework.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Kanban Method: Visualize and Optimize Flow
item.description: Kanban helps teams visualize work and limit work in progress.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Agile Planning: Adaptive and Continuous
item.description: Agile planning happens at multiple levels continuously.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Writing Effective User Stories
item.description: User stories capture requirements from the user's perspective.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Agile Estimation Techniques
item.description: Agile estimation focuses on relative size, not exact hours.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Servant Leadership in Project Management
item.description: Servant leaders prioritize the needs of their team.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Emotional Intelligence for Project Managers
item.description: Emotional intelligence helps project managers lead people effectively.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Conflict Management Strategies
item.description: Conflict is inevitable in projects; how you handle it matters.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Business Acumen for Project Managers
item.description: Project managers must understand the business context of their projects.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Stakeholder Engagement for Business Results
item.description: Stakeholder engagement drives business value and project success.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Value Delivery in PMBOK 8
item.description: PMBOK 8 places value delivery at the center of project management.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky
